subject: Sichuan Airlines (3U) Direct Pricing Research: CTU/TFU to LAX
research_method: Web scraping and aggregator data collection

main_site.technology: jQuery 3.6.0, Prototype.js, custom IBE (Intelligent Booking Engine)
main_site.global_site_framework: ASP.NET MVC (based on URL patterns like /Home/SearchFlight, /OutB2C/)

api_endpoints_discovered.note: Flight search endpoint is JavaScript-generated and not statically discoverable. The IBE processes search via JS validation before submitting to server. Likely requires session cookies and CSRF tokens.

website_analysis.direct_api_scraping_status: FAILED - The booking engine requires full JavaScript execution, session management, and anti-bot protections (device fingerprinting via Tencent Cloud). Direct API calls to guessed endpoints returned 404. A headless browser approach (Playwright/Puppeteer) would be needed to interact with the booking engine.

route_information.arrival_airport: Los Angeles International Airport (LAX), Terminal B

outbound_3U3837.note: Some dates show 22:00 or 23:00 departure with slight schedule variations

schedule.effective_date: January 2, 2026 (nonstop; previously routed via Hangzhou as technical stop)

route_information.important_note: Route now operates from TFU (Chengdu Tianfu), NOT CTU (Chengdu Shuangliu). Some booking engines still reference CTU but the actual airport is TFU.

business.note: 28 seats in 1-2-1 configuration. Described as 'crazy cheap' by some travelers relative to competitors.

pricing_data.data_quality_note: Prices collected from Trip.com, web search snippets, and aggregator landing pages. These are indicative/recent prices, not guaranteed live quotes for specific future dates. Sichuan Airlines' own booking engine could not be scraped directly.

nonstop_typical_range.note: Varies significantly by season and advance purchase

one_way_from_LAX_to_TFU.note: 16% discount from $1,464 base. One-way originating from US is typically much more expensive.

general_range.note: Baseline around $850-879 for nonstop Sichuan Airlines. Higher in peak summer (June).

from_aggregators.note: Sichuan Airlines described as 'one of the cheapest airlines offering nonstop flights' on this route

may_2026.confidence: MEDIUM - Based on April pricing trends and seasonal patterns. May is shoulder season, slightly above spring low.
may_2026.notes: May is between spring low and summer peak. Expect prices 5-15% above spring baseline.

june_2026.confidence: MEDIUM - June is identified as the MOST EXPENSIVE month for this route.
june_2026.notes: Peak summer travel. Aggregators explicitly note June as highest-priced month for LAX-CTU.

september_2026.confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH - September identified as one of the best value months.
september_2026.notes: Average RT price around $855. Post-summer shoulder season with lower demand. Good value window.

estimates_from_context.note: Based on forum reports of 'crazy cheap' fares relative to competitors, and a reference to ~AUD $3,200 for Europe routes. US-China business class on 3U is typically 2.5-4x economy.
estimates_from_context.seat_product: Lie-flat 1-2-1 reverse herringbone on A350. Service is Sichuan cuisine focused, no meal choice.

competitor_comparison_on_route.note: These are connecting flight prices, not nonstop
competitor_comparison_on_route.sichuan_nonstop_advantage: Only airline with nonstop TFU-LAX service. Premium of ~$100-200 over cheapest connecting options is typical.

scraping_approaches_attempted.result: SUCCESS - Extracted site structure, subdomains, API endpoint hints
PARTIAL - Page structure extracted, search form fields identified, but JS-rendered content not accessible

scraping_approaches_attempted.approach: Direct API endpoint guessing on global.sichuanair.com
scraping_approaches_attempted.reason: Endpoints require proper session, CSRF tokens, and JavaScript execution

scraping_approaches_attempted.result: PARTIAL - Confirmed OpenJaw commerce platform, IBE.js framework, but search requires JS execution
FAILED - Flutter web app, fully compiled/obfuscated JavaScript, no static API discovery possible
SUCCESS - Best data source. Extracted specific Sichuan Airlines prices for nonstop flights
FAILED - JS-only app, returns 'enable JavaScript' message
PARTIAL first attempt, then rate limited (429)
SUCCESS - Confirmed Q1 2026 schedule change to nonstop service
SUCCESS - Detailed aircraft, terminal, gate, check-in, and punctuality data

steps: 2. Wait for page load and JavaScript execution
6. Submit search and wait for results
7. Parse the results DOM for flight prices and fare classes
for_live_prices.alternative: Use Trip.com or Skyscanner with Playwright - more reliable and aggregates multiple fare classes

for_bulk_monitoring.method: Google Flights API via SerpApi ($50/mo) or Amadeus Flight Offers Search API (free tier available)
for_bulk_monitoring.note: These provide structured JSON responses with Sichuan Airlines pricing when available on GDS

booking_tips.advance_purchase_savings: Book 2+ months ahead for ~10% savings on international
booking_tips.airport_note: Book to/from TFU (Tianfu), not CTU (Shuangliu). Some engines still show CTU but actual operations are from TFU.
booking_tips.nonstop_premium: Sichuan Airlines is the ONLY nonstop carrier on this route. Connecting options on Air China, China Southern etc. are $100-200 cheaper but add 5-15 hours of travel.
